markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Interviewing Leah Myers for an Operations role.](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Leah Myers's experience at Apollo—building a CS org from scratch by integrating product usage data (Snowflake) with GTM data (Salesforce) in Vitally—directly matches the agency's needs.](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [The agency is at "step zero" with operations, using manual Notion databases for "vibes-based" health scores and lacking a single source of truth for metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [A key challenge is the hybrid business model: a services agency ($13M ARR) transitioning to a customer-facing product company in 2–3 months.](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [The role is critical for building foundational systems (health scores, playbooks) and a data baseline to support scaling from 50 to 200+ clients.](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)

## Topics

### Agency's Operational State

  - [**Business Model:** A services agency ($13M ARR) using a proprietary platform internally, transitioning to a customer-facing product company in 2–3 months.](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [**Current State:** "Step zero" operations.](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=1984.0)
      - [**Data:** Scattered across Notion, Airtable, and Google Docs.](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
      - [**Health Scores:** Manual, "vibes-based" scores in Notion databases.](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
      - [**Metrics:** No single source of truth; basic revenue/churn data requires manual hacking.](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=1984.0)
  - [**Key Challenges:**](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)
      - [**Role Ambiguity:** Editors currently manage client relationships, a role separation is underway.](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=2124.0)
      - [**Scaling:** Current manual processes cannot support growth from 50 to 200+ clients.](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=1971.0)
      - [**Mindset Shift:** Unlearning SaaS-centric ops to fit the services model.](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=2343.0)

### Leah Myers's Relevant Experience

  - [**Apollo Case Study:** Built a CS org from scratch, solving for "janky" product usage data.](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
      - [**Data Pipeline:** Integrated product usage data (Snowflake) with GTM data (Salesforce) in Vitally.](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [**Health Scores:** Implemented two distinct scores: one for onboarding risk and one for renewal likelihood.](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
      - [**Team Enablement:** Created dashboards for CSMs to review account health before calls and for execs to track team effectiveness at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [**Automation Philosophy:** Automate personal tasks on the 2nd–3rd repetition; proactively identify and automate team tasks before they become bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
  - [**AI Experience:** Early adopter; trained an Intercom chatbot after a "hard fail" to limit its scope and prevent internal issues.](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)

### Role & Fit

  - [**Candidate Motivation:** Seeks a role with significant impact and autonomy to build systems from a "blank slate."](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
  - [**Hiring Manager Perspective:** The role is a "must-have" to build foundational systems and a data baseline.](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)
  - [**Urgency:** The agency needs to move quickly, as the candidate is in late-stage talks with another company.](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=2284.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bridget McGillivray:** Discuss next steps with Andy.](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=2262.0)
  - [**Leah Myers:** Keep Bridget and Andy updated on the other interview process.](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=2288.0)
  - [**Bridget McGillivray & Andy:** Expedite the interview process, potentially scheduling a "Steinman" session next week.](https://fathom.video/share/xDH-juyNiZEKg1PVYsJGc7uF9JaSqXiR?tab=summary&timestamp=2267.0)
